longDescription: Discover Balloon ride Switzerland 2 hours region by choice in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Ballooning
subcategory.description: Book a hot air balloon ride in Switzerland. Since the first balloon went up over Basel in 1788, ballooning has been one of the most special experiences. You float almost silently over the mountains, lakes or cities and can see the world from a bird's eye view. You will enjoy views and a silence that you can only enjoy in a balloon. In good weather, balloon flights are possible all year round.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Hot air balloon floats over green meadows on a sunny day in Western Switzerland.
Hot air balloons flying in the field under clear skies
Hot air balloon over green meadow at sunrise, people waiting
Hot air balloon offers a view of Lake Constance, green meadows, mountains in the background.
Hot air balloons at the take-off and landing area between fields and trees
